ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the core execution frame for drive-cycle ageing campaigns.

sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M15] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Calendar ageing test (battery under rest)," White Paper, 2018, pp. 58-61.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the primary execution reference for SOC-temperature storage loops with periodic 25 C check-ups.
Use literature to rationalize matrix breadth and selected extra diagnostics, not to remove the fixed storage-check-up loop.
